description: From the Publisher Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Roller Set 9" The Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Twin Medium Pile Paint Roller Set is your ultimate tool for achieving seriously good results when painting semi-smooth surfaces with emulsion paint. This set includes a 9-inch soft grip roller frame, 2 medium pile roller sleeves, and a 9-inch roller tray, providing everything you need for a smooth and efficient painting experience. Medium pile is ideal for use on older plastered walls and walls with spots of repair damage Flexibility of two sleeves: you can easily swap between paint colors or continue painting while cleaning the other sleeve Extended your reach: the roller frame can be attached to a Harris Extension Pole, allowing you to cover larger areas faster. Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Twin Medium Pile Paint Roller Set with Tray & Frame | 9" Your paint roller set for achieving seriously good results when painting with emulsion paint. This brush set contains: 1 x 9" Soft Grip Paint Roller Frame 2 x 9" Medium Pile Paint Roller Sleeves 1 x 9" Paint Roller Tray Achieve seriously good results Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Paint Roller Set A roller set for achieving a professional finish on Walls & Ceilings Advanced roller fabric gives a seriously good finish. Roller sleeves use anti spatter fabric so paint goes on the wall, not your floor. All-in-one Set This roller set contains: 1 x 9" Soft Grip Paint Roller Frame, 2 x 9" Medium Pile Paint Roller Sleeves and 1 x 9" Paint Roller Tray. Specialized for use with emulsion paint. Designed for use on walls & ceilings. The roller sleeves in this set are specially developed to deliver an even finish with reduced splatter, minimizing mess and ensuring a professional-looking result. The medium pile is ideal for use on older plastered walls and walls with spots of repair damage. With the flexibility of two sleeves, you can easily swap between paint colors or continue painting while cleaning the other sleeve. For best results, lightly rinse the roller sleeve in water before use to remove any loose fibers. For extended reach, the roller frame can be attached to a Harris Extension Pole, allowing you to cover larger areas faster. Upgrade your painting game with the Harris Seriously Good Walls & Ceilings Twin Medium Pile Paint Roller Set Q: What type of surfaces can I use this roller set on? A: This roller set is designed for use on semi-smooth surfaces, such as older plastered walls and walls with spots of repair damage. Q: Can I use this set with emulsion paint? A: Yes, this set is compatible with emulsion paints, allowing you to achieve seriously good results. Q: Does the set come with reduced splatter technology? A: Absolutely! The roller sleeves in this set are developed to deliver an even finish with reduced splatter, making your painting experience cleaner and more enjoyable. Q: Can I attach the roller frame to a Harris Extension Pole? A: Yes, the roller frame is compatible with Harris Extension Pole, providing extended reach and allowing you to cover larger areas faster. Q: How should I prepare the roller sleeves before use? A: It is recommended to lightly rinse the roller sleeves in water before use to remove any loose fibers and ensure a smooth painting surface. Q: How do I clean the roller sleeves after use? A: After using water-based paints, such as emulsion, wash the roller sleeves in warm soapy water to remove excess paint. Allow them to dry naturally, standing up. Q: Can I reuse the roller sleeves? A: The roller sleeves are designed for multiple uses, but ensure they are cleaned properly between uses for optimal performance. Q: What size is the roller frame and tray in this set? A: The roller frame and tray included in this set are both 9 inches in size, providing a suitable and convenient painting solution. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort.
